'''AF-119'''<ref name="JKTCG" /> was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="Complete Visual" /> who served as a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] was stationed in a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]<ref name="JKTCG" /> after the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was [[Occupation of Bespin|occupied]] by Imperial forces<ref name="Bespin DB">{{DB|location|bespin|Bespin}}</ref> led by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]]<ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref> in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|V}}, including the [[occupation of Bespin]] that AF-119 partook in according to {{JKTCG|set=Premiere|cardname=AF-119 • Cloud City Garrison|link=http://www.decipher.com/jediknights/cardlists/premier/large/48Caf119cloudcitygarrison.html}}, to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> AF-119 was armed with an [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]]. He found his assigned guard duty on Bespin boring, and preferred the excitement of [[Hunting/Legends|hunting]] [[Gundark/Legends|gundarks]].<ref name="JKTCG" /> AF-119 also found the Cloud City [[Casino/Legends|casinos]] lost their attraction after he was stationed on the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] for an extended period.<ref name="JKTCG2" />

==Behind the scenes==
AF-119 was created by a card for the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG2" />
